testInfo.summary: This test case checks for the proper error handling during the standard credential issuance flow using an emulated wallet when an unknown credential identifier is used.

results.response_body: {"credential_issuer":"https://issuer.lab.fikua.com","authorization_servers":["https://issuer.lab.fikua.com"],"credential_endpoint":"https://issuer.lab.fikua.com/oid4vci/v1/credential","nonce_endpoint":"https://issuer.lab.fikua.com/oid4vci/v1/nonce","notification_endpoint":"https://issuer.lab.fikua.com/oid4vci/v1/notification","credential_response_encryption":{"alg_values_supported":["ECDH-ES"],"encryption_required":false,"enc_values_supported":["A128GCM","A256GCM"]},"batch_credential_issuance":{"batch_size":1},"credential_configurations_supported":{"eu.europa.ec.eudi.pid.1":{"format":"dc+sd-jwt","scope":"eu.europa.ec.eudi.pid.1","cryptographic_binding_methods_supported":["jwk"],"credential_signing_alg_values_supported":["ES256"],"proof_types_supported":{"jwt":{"proof_signing_alg_values_supported":["ES256"]}},"vct":"eu.europa.ec.eudi.pid.1","credential_metadata":{"display":[{"description":"EU Digital Identity Personal Identification Data","locale":"en","name":"EUDI PID"}],"claims":[{"path":["given_name"],"display":[{"locale":"en","name":"Given Name"}]},{"path":["family_name"],"display":[{"locale":"en","name":"Surname"}]},{"path":["birth_date"],"display":[{"locale":"en","name":"Date of Birth"}]},{"path":["issuing_authority"],"display":[{"locale":"en","name":"Issuing Authority"}]},{"path":["issuing_country"],"display":[{"locale":"en","name":"Issuing Country"}]}]}}},"display":[{"locale":"en","name":"Fikua Lab Issuer"}]}

results.msg: Using credential scope value to reference credential_configuration_id

results.msg: 'error' is not present in URL fragment returned from authorization endpoint
Authorization code is not present in URL fragment returned from authorization endpoint
state is correctly not present in URL fragment/hash returned from authorization endpoint (as in the authorization code flow it must be returned in the URL query only)
authorization endpoint response does not include unexpected parameters
'iss' parameter in authorization response matches server's issuer value.
Authorization code is of sufficient length
Generated the Client Attestation Proof JWT
Added htm/htu to DPoP proof claims

Skipped evaluation due to missing required element: token_endpoint_response refresh_token

Test is not targeting Open ID Connect and the token endpoint response does not contain an ID token

Added x-fapi-interaction-id to resource endpoint request headers
https://issuer.lab.fikua.com/oid4vci/v1/nonce endpoint returned the expected http status
